fagner_adler.name: Fagner Adler
fagner_adler.relationship: CEO of Ialum. Manuel's boss. Potential co-founder partner.
wants: Have AI infrastructure (500GB GPU) generating revenue
Build Ialum into a profitable AI platform
Find a technical co-founder who can execute his vision
fears: Investment dries up before product generates revenue
Manuel takes the IP and leaves
Technical execution stalls without a strong engineer
leverage: Has network and access to investment funds
vulnerability: Has no other AI engineer of Manuel's caliber
Platform exists more in vision than in production code
Cannot build the AI product himself — needs Manuel

patterns.pattern: Brief morning messages focused on priorities. Said 'resumiu muito bem' — engaged when shown technical depth. Responds to concrete outputs, not plans.

likely_moves: Ask Manuel to focus on Ialum product development
Delay equity formalization to test commitment
Use infrastructure access as retention leverage
red_lines: Losing control of the company direction
Manuel working on Bluewave during Ialum hours
Manuel taking Ialum clients for Bluewave
fagner_adler.concession_style: Pragmatic. Values demonstrated competence over promises. Will concede equity if value is proven. Communicates briefly — morning person, action-oriented.

signals_history.note: Initial model based on Manuel's descriptions and Fagner's communication patterns observed in WhatsApp transcriptions.
